_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Advise senior management on risk levels, security posture, and necessary changes to existing AI policies.​
reference_document_element_description: Develop and present executive-level data and AI strategy recommendations, including business case, risk assessment, and implementation sequencing rationale.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI RM domain. RM-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-010 (SP, cosine: 0.645), AG-K-002 (AG, cosine: 0.635).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.556). Shared vocabulary: [ai, risk]. DCWF-only terms [advise, changes, existing, levels, management, necessary] vs WIDAI-only terms [assessment, business, case, data, develop, executive] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.889 (P=0.893, R=0.886). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Advise senior management on risk levels, security posture, and necessary changes" and "Develop and present executive-level data and AI strategy recommendations, includ" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.657 > STS 0.556 (gap +0.101). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai, risk] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [ai, risk]. DCWF-only: [advise, changes, existing, levels, management, necessary]. WIDAI-only: [assessment, business, case, data, develop, executive].
